---
name: Feature — Enigma
about: Propose a new feature or capability for the project
title: "feat: "
labels: ["feature"]
assignees: []
---

## 📌 Title
Provide a concise and descriptive title for the feature.

---

## 🧭 Description
Clearly explain **what should be implemented** and **why it is necessary**.

Include when relevant:

- The problem this feature addresses
- Expected impact on users or the system
- Important background information
- Optional implementation direction

Prioritize clarity over verbosity.

---

## ✔️ Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Feature behaves as described
- [ ] Aligns with project architecture and coding standards
- [ ] No breaking changes are introduced
- [ ] Tests added or updated when applicable
- [ ] Documentation updated if required

---

## 📚 AI Context

These resources provide essential project context and should be reviewed before starting:

- https://github.com/ColombiaBlockChain/Enigma/blob/main/docs/README.md
- https://github.com/ColombiaBlockChain/Enigma/blob/main/docs/AI.md
- https://github.com/ColombiaBlockChain/Enigma/tree/main/docs/standards

**Mandatory:** Review the full `/docs` directory to properly understand the project:

https://github.com/ColombiaBlockChain/Enigma/tree/main/docs

Do not remove this section. Adding more context is encouraged when it improves implementation quality.

---

## 📝 Additional Notes
Include any constraints, references, design links, or technical considerations that may support a successful delivery.
